prompt: Describe the image in a long, detailed paragraph. Be thorough and cover the main subject, the setting, all visible objects, actions, spatial relationships, colors, and contextual details. Aim for a rich, complete description of the scene.

baseline.caption_ref:
The image depicts a lively gathering where several people are playing video games on a Nintendo Wii console. In total, there are nine individuals present in various positions around the room. One young girl is standing up and actively engaged with the game using a remote control. Another person can be seen holding a wine glass, possibly enjoying some drinks during the party.

The living area features two couches placed against the walls, one nearer to the left side of the room and another towards the right side. There's also a chair located closer to the center of the space. Various bottles are scattered throughout the room, indicating that guests have been consuming refreshments while they play. Additionally, a cup can be spotted close to the middle-right part of the room.
